other_observers: Joey Kellner saw the bird on 2 January 2006. Stan Oswald saw the bird on 14 January 2006, Bill Maynard and Kara Lewantowicz saw the bird on 15 January. Probably seen by many others.; Bill McGurn and Mymm Ackley saw the bird with me on 11 December. Several people including Chris Wood, Lisa Edwards, Tony Leukering, Glenn Walbek saw the by with me on 17 December. Duane Nelson saw the bird with me on 16 January 2006.
specific_location: Valco Ponds, along Arkansas River, below Pueblo Reservoir dam.
description: The flycatcher with black head, chest, and back, with white belly and under tail coverts. The bird pumped the tail often.Behaviors: Bill McGurn and I found the bird first on 11 December 2005 along the Arkansas River, below Pueblo Reservoir dam, near Valco Ponds. The bird mostly stayed near the river picking insects from the water.Call: A loud pip loud, similar to Swamp Sparrow.Plumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
